This is the biggest park which I've visited in my life. this is all only inside the golden gate park !!!! *   Image 13 10 ### The Best of San Francisco eBike Tour 5.0 (16) from $104. The best Segway tour in San francisco. My father and I just did a 1.5 hour guided Segway tour of golden gate park. You follow the leader,on the Segway and they take you off-roading to see all the monuments and statues and flowers and shrubbery in the park. All in all, a fun way to spend time in golden gate park. It was a fun experience, and nice to see the park while not on foot.

title: Golden Gate Park, San Francisco, California, United States
content: Golden Gate Park is hands down one of the best urban parks in the country, with a mix of leisure, historic, and cultural adventures suited for visitors of any age. Across its acres, you could easily stumble upon a drum circle or yoga class, catch an exhibit at a world-class San Francisco museum, sit in a serene garden with a good book, and walk or bike for miles, all in a day. The Conservatory of Flowers, the oldest building in the park, is a Victorian greenhouse home to a diverse and worldly collection of plants and blooms. A day spent in Golden Gate Park is a good one. $$$ | United States, San Francisco, 757 Market St. As stone's throw from San Francisco's cultural institutions, the Four Seasons combines modern luxury with a great location. $$$ | United States, San Francisco, 125 3rd St. The St. Regis is a proper luxury hotel, with amenities worth checking in for and prime SoMA location.
